# Sunnatbek Yusupov

> Sunnatbek Yusupov is a Frontend Engineer, AI Integration Specialist and the Founder & CEO of Aidevix — the first AI-first programming education platform for the Uzbek-speaking world. Based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan.

## Who he is

- Founder & CEO of Aidevix (https://aidevix.uz) — AI-first coding education platform in Uzbek, founded August 2025. Mission: prepare 100,000+ AI-fluent developers across Uzbekistan by 2030.
- Team Lead / Senior Frontend Engineer at Alloplay — a Netflix-style DRM-protected video streaming platform (Dec 2025 – present).
- Senior Frontend Mentor & Curriculum Lead at MARS IT School (May 2023 – present) — mentored and graduated 200+ frontend engineers, delivered 100+ workshops for 500+ learners. Awarded Best Teacher (Q3 2024).
- Previously: Frontend Developer at Uysavdo (real-estate platform serving 50,000+ active users), Frontend Mentor at Farobiy Academy / Najot Ta'lim.

## Expertise

- Frontend: React, Next.js (SSR/ISR), TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, GraphQL, REST APIs
- AI: Prompt Engineering (Chain-of-Thought, ReAct, Few-Shot), LLM APIs (GPT, Claude, Gemini), RAG, AI agents, function calling
- Education: technical curriculum design, mentoring, public speaking
